prompt: Accidental candid iPhone front-camera photo captured inside a small neighborhood convenience store. A young Korean woman stands in the checkout line, casually wiping a trace of sweat from her forehead while balancing a shopping basket. She looks off to the side with a slightly impatient, distracted expression, completely unaware of the camera. Faded sage-green oversized cotton T-shirt, relaxed fit, loose braid draped over one shoulder. Natural skin texture with visible pores, subtle facial shine from indoor warmth, realistic imperfections, no beauty retouching. Bright overhead fluorescent lighting creates cool-toned shadows and a faint yellow-green store color cast. Authentic smartphone image quality from an older iPhone, slight motion blur on the moving hand, mild sensor noise, compressed detail, imperfect framing, spontaneous everyday moment. Cluttered convenience-store aisles and checkout displays in the background. A small guinea pig is barely visible near the bottom corner of the frame, appearing accidentally included in the shot.
